jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Rate-limit store and API guard regressions passed: 9 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /api/images/upload and file-proxy unauth probes returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 shared Redis-capable API rate limiting
lastRun.summary: Unified API/file-upload/file-proxy rate checks onto the shared rate-limit store so Redis is used when REDIS_URL is configured. Legacy synchronous login checks remain on the local helper for compatibility with the account-lockout flow.
validation: recent production service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 architecture hardening: move command/deployment SSH execution out of synchronous API paths or replace remaining shell-string exec surfaces where practical.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
